CLBConfig.RunR: X = Solver$Geometry$X Y = Solver$Geometry$Y x = seq(min(X), max(X)) tab = data.frame(x=x, y= -16*sin(pi*x/64)+33) tab2 = data.frame(x=x, y= 64 - -16*sin(pi*x/64)+33) sel = rep(FALSE, length(X)) sel2 = rep(FALSE, length(X)) for (i in 1:nrow(tab)) { sel = sel | tab$y > Y sel2 = sel2 | Y > tab2$y } Solver$Geometry$BOUNDARY[sel] = "Wall" Solver$Geometry$COLLISION[sel] = "None" Solver$Geometry$BOUNDARY[sel2] = "Wall" Solver$Geometry$COLLISION[sel2] = "None"
